name: Tiny Tim
title: Tiny Tim - taken 11/30/96 died shortly after photo on 11/30/96, 64)
description: Tiny Tim - taken 11/30/96 died shortly after photo on 11/30/96, 64)
bio: Tiny Tim was an American singer, ukulele player, and musical archivist known for his distinctive high-pitched voice and performance of "Tiptoe Through the Tulips". He became a beloved novelty act and cultural curiosity.
